text:
This PR is based on ports/134618
i updated it to correctly support OPTIONS and changed mininal BDB version
to recommended in INN manual.

this version is tested and works good, 2.4.5 version segfaults on bsd.
- Update to 2.4.6

- files/patch-ipv6

Port maintainer (shaun@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
